description_long: This lamp features a vintage, industrial design with a rusted metal arm and mounting base, supporting a single glass globe shade. The arm is angular and segmented, giving it a mechanical, utilitarian appearance, while the mounting hardware and joints are robust and detailed. The glass globe is semi-transparent with a frosted lower section, diffusing light softly. The metal components have a weathered, oxidized finish, suggesting long-term outdoor use. The lamp is designed to be mounted on a ceiling or overhead structure, with the light source hanging downward. Decorative cutouts and structural details on the metal housing add to its antique character.
description: A vintage industrial-style ceiling lamp with a rusted metal arm and a frosted glass globe shade, featuring ornate metalwork and a weathered finish.
description_view_0: Side view showing the angular, rusted metal arm and the full glass globe shade hanging below.
description_view_1: Direct bottom-up view highlighting the circular glass globe and the metal housing's decorative cutouts.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the segmented arm and the globe's attachment to the mounting base.
description_view_3: Top-down view focusing on the mounting base and the vertical segment of the arm above the globe.
